case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS PHAM, THU VAN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, THU VAN
